content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit is imported and `HMHomeManager()` is instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:6, but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI (the list only shows wallpaper categories at WallpaperGridView.swift:12).
Pierre: Apple scrutinizes HomeKit usage because the framework grants access to a user's home and accessory data, so it must power genuine home-automation features. Here the HomeKit import and manager appear in a wallpaper app that shows no home/accessory UI, which may trigger review questions about why the entitlement is present. Remove the unused HomeKit dependency, or add real home-related functionality and disclose it in the metadata.
